channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:
Tonight some lowlife has dumped aload of rubbish right outside out property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti with profanities, 8th April
item.description:
Going up the stairs on the right wall there is written profanity in a few sentences. Please walk up the stairs and look right on inside wall in white graffiti.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked on a double yellow line causing congestion, 8th April
item.description:
Every week just outside Forest Hill station (platform 2 exit) on Perry Vale, cars are parked along the whole road on a double yellow line. This makes it impossible for two-way traffic. This usually occurs in the evenings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Perry Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Holes in Road, 8th April
item.description:
Large pot holes on both sides of the road. Cars are dangerously driving around them into oncoming traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dreadful build up of litter, 8th April
item.description:
At either end of the pedestrian foot bridge that crosses over the A406 litter has accumulated. It desperately needs to be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Advent Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin full filled with cans and bottles, 8th April
item.description:
Food waste bin full filled with cans and bottles. It has been there for a month already and not collected as the waste inside does not correspond with the waste bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2,3,4, Melior Place, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Arson Vandalism to Cycle Bay Bollards, 8th April
item.description:
Ongoing campaign against essential bike parking bay which has been newly installed. Bollards vandalised/burnt. Bikes repeatedly vandalised. Please rebuild robustly to ensure that this much needed facility is retained.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Rise, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard, 8th April
item.description:
It’s been like this for a while

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continual dumping of waste, 8th April
item.description:
More multiple bags of waste have been dumped again! These multiple black bags have been left on numerous occasions recently. It’s becoming increasingly frustrating!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: [Portable loo] abandoned by council, 8th April
item.description:
There is a zip tied [Portable loo] that had been left by council builders? It’s really starting to smell and has been left in a residential area
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felstead Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on street, 8th April
item.description:
Flytipping on street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 8th April
item.description:
Dumped mattress that was previously reported was marked as fixed. This mattress still remains & has just been leant up against the fence at the rear of 186. It needs to be removed as it is an eyesore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report of Fly-Tipping at Woolwich New Cemetery, 8th April
item.description:
Earlier today, I observed a local resident, accompanied by a child, carrying a door along Camdale Road and subsequently dumping it just behind the cemetery gate. This crime took place within the grounds of Woolwich New Cemetery, which I understand includes Commonwealth war graves. I found this particularly disappointing given the significance of the site. The deliberate disposal of waste in such a location reflects a lack of respect for both the environment and the historical importance of the cemetery. I would be grateful if this matter could be investigated and appropriate action taken.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Camdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytippng, 8th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer has been dumped and is in a dangerous position.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 362, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in the pavement causing a trip/fall hazard to people, 8th April
item.description:
Neighbours at no33 dug up the pavement when doing building work to their home and left a hole in the pavement. The hole is big enough to catch your foot and cause a trip fall. The hole has been there for several months. No33 occasionally hide it with a traffic cone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks, no works ongoing, significant disruption, 8th April
item.description:
Roadworks ongoing with no work being carried out. Notice says these should have ended on 7th April. Have passed this section of the road at various times in the last few days and the disruption to traffic given the position next to 3 junctions and a cross road traffic lights is significant. The roadworks remain in place today and there is still nothing being done at the site (just a hole, no workers present except for a car)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 233, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste not collected for days, 8th April
item.description:
Things have got bad again. Why isn’t the commercial waste from Micky’s chippy collected every day as it should be.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abusive graffiti, 8th April
item.description:
Someone has drawn the racist graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, Health Hazard & Vermin at end of Fortune Walk (SE28 0EL), 8th April
item.description:
Fly-tipped rubbish on the public footpath at the end of Fortune Walk, at the junction with Garrick Drive (SE28 0EL). Whoever closed our original report is lying. Picture taken right now!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chamberlain Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front of estate communal area, 8th April
item.description:
Household items left for collection ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aberdour Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
